message:
test(io_driver): add EpollReactor integration tests for waker dispatch

Add integration tests verifying the full IoDriver + EpollReactor flow:
- io_driver_with_epoll_reactor_dispatches_waker: verifies readable events
  trigger waker dispatch through the full stack
- io_driver_with_epoll_reactor_writable: verifies writable events work

These tests demonstrate that EpollReactor::poll() correctly returns events
and IoDriver::turn() properly dispatches wakers for each event.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
